question: Which combination of techniques can be used to automatically segment images of bacterial colonies?

answers.answer: Only manual annotation and colour selection.
Thresholding, connected component analysis, and other image processing tools.
Only Gaussian blurring and colour conversion.
Image resizing and metadata extraction only.

question: The colony counting methods covered in this workshop are useful for which types of scientific problems?

answers.answer: Only problems involving the colour of objects in an image.
Only problems involving very large datasets that cannot be processed manually.
Many scientific problems, especially those involving morphometrics.
Only problems involving bacteria in petri dishes.
